# Prompt files (Lab 2b)

Create reusable slash-commands here, e.g. `plan.prompt.md` (a /plan command that
explores the codebase and writes PLAN.md WITHOUT writing code), `review.prompt.md`
(runs the payments-reviewer persona from templates/), `spec.prompt.md` (drafts a
spec from templates/spec-template.md). Starter pack ships in this folder: `plan.prompt.md`, `review.prompt.md`,
`spec.prompt.md` — alongside `/loop` and the `/speckit.*` chain.
